zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannsen Bauers於1485年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格安納貝格多福時，他的父親Valten Bauer15歲，母親Mrs. Valten Bauer20歲。他於1514年與Barbara Hnerinn在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格多福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年在薩辛阿赤 姆尼次享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bauers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Bauer , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or from a first part of an original compound name (e.g. Bauersfeld ).

variants.name: Bauer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Heinz, Manfred, Franz, Gerhard, Johannes, Wolfgang.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): status name for a peasant or nickname meaning ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, from Middle High German (ge)būr, Middle Low German būr, denoting an occupant of a būr, a small dwelling or building. This word later fell together with Middle High German būwære, an agent noun from Old High German būwan ‘to cultivate’, later also (at first in Low German dialects) ‘to build’. The precise meaning of the Jewish surname, which is of later formation, is unclear. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic status names or surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Hannsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Per, Alf, Maren, Nels, Tollef, Tor.  German Otto, Manfred, Monika.

Norwegian, North German, Dutch, Flemish, and Danish: patronymic from the personal name   Hans  , a variant of   Hansen  . As a Dutch and Flemish name it is particularly common in Dutch and Belgian Limburg. Compare   Hansen   and   Hansson   2.

en.lifeSummary: When Hannsen Bauers was born in 1485, in Neundorf, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Valten Bauer, was 15 and his mother, Mrs. Valten Bauer, was 20. He married Barbara Hnerinn in 1514, in Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1547, in Amt Chemnitz, Saxony, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannsen Bauers est né en 1485, à Neundorf, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Valten Bauer, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Valten Bauer, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Hnerinn en 1514, à Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1547, à Amt Chemnitz, Sachsen, à l’âge de 62 ans.

Er hat 1514 in Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Barbara Hnerinn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1547 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Amt Chemnitz, Sachsen.

ko.Neundorf, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Saxo: 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 애나버그 니우도르프
ko.lifeSummary: Hannsen Bauers(이)가 1485년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 애나버그 니우도르프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valten Bauer(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Valten Bauer(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1514년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 니우도르프에서 Barbara Hnerinn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 작센 아트 체니츠에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannsen Bauers nasceu em 1485, em Neundorf, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Valten Bauer, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Valten Bauer, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Hnerinn em 1514, em Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1547, em Amt Chemnitz, Sachsen, com 62 anos.

ru.Neundorf, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Saxo: неундорф, аннабирг, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannsen Bauers родился в 1485 г. в местности неундорф, аннабирг, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Valten Bauer было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Valten Bauer, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Hnerinn в 1514 г. в местности неундорф, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1547 г. в местности амт чемниц, сачсен в возрасте 62 лет.
